title: Berlin Directness - Quick Summary
items: Berliners are not always rude — many are simply more **direct** than visitors expect.
**Berliner Schnauze** describes Berlin's blunt, dry, no-nonsense communication style.
A short answer, neutral face, or efficient service often reflects **local culture**, not hostility.
Learning a few basic German phrases can make everyday interactions much smoother.
Once you understand the tone, Berlin often feels **more honest and more relaxed** than many visitors expect.
